nasb.text: “So I turned and came down from the mountain while the mountain was burning with fire, and the two tablets of the covenant were in my two hands.

esv.text: So I turned and came down from the mountain, and the mountain was burning with fire. And the two tablets of the covenant were in my two hands.

cnv.text: 於是我轉身，從山上下來，山上有火燒著；我手中拿著兩塊約版。

ccb.text: 我双手拿着那两块石版，转身从烈火熊熊的山上下来，
